calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-19-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514 Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:

Tony Ruch, Esq. for and with Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Phillip Morgan, Esq., representing the Defendants Yvonne Cato and Lauren Cato through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502-B, for settlement discussions.

Case settled, the trial date vacated.

Settlement agreement filed in open court.
